name: Coconut and Macadamia Nut Banana Breadsjb
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
1 cup Sweetened flaked coconut, toasted lightly and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream the butter with the sugars. Beat in the vanilla, eggs (one at a time), zest, banana, and sour cream. Mix until just combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until the batter is smooth. Stir in the macadamia nuts and coconut.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 5 buttered and floured loaf pans (5 x 3/4 x 2 inches). Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Remove the breads from the pans and let them cool on a rack. The breads will keep, wrapped well in plastic wrap and foil, refrigerated for up to 1 week or frozen for up to 1 month.
